message:
fix: add Terminate Session button to AI Missions (#3608) (#3617)

Add a prominent "Terminate Session" button that appears when an AI
mission is running, giving users a clear way to cancel in-progress
tasks. The button is shown in three locations:

- Mission chat header (prominent styled button with StopCircle icon)
- Mission chat input area (replaces the hard-to-find "Cancel" text link)
- Mission list item (stop icon for quick termination without opening chat)

The terminate action sends a cancel signal to the backend (via WebSocket
or HTTP fallback), aborts pending requests, and resets UI state.

Closes #3608

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
